buff_types.name: Drill
buff_types.description: {plural} have 15% shorter build/train times in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Logistics
buff_types.description: {plural} cost 20% less in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Mobility
buff_types.description: {plural} move faster in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Armor Plating
buff_types.description: {plural} take less incoming damage in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Reinforced Frames
buff_types.description: {plural} gain more health in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Recon Package
buff_types.description: {plural} gain more vision in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Firepower
buff_types.description: {plural} deal more weapon damage in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Weapon Tuning
buff_types.description: {plural} fire their weapons faster in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Optics
buff_types.description: {plural} gain more weapon range in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Ammo Reserves
buff_types.description: {plural} gain +1 ammo capacity per stack, allowing more ammo-consuming attacks before reloading or rearming in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Repair Systems
buff_types.description: {plural} gain self-healing in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Stealth Systems
buff_types.description: {plural} gain cloaking in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Sensor Suite
buff_types.description: {plural} gain sensors in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Veteran Training
buff_types.description: {plural} start as veterans for the player house in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Command Capacity
buff_types.description: {plural} can have one additional unit active at the same time in future launched missions.

superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Lightning Storm Power
superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Lightning Storm in future launched missions.

superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Nuclear Missile Power
superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Tactical Nuke in future launched missions.

superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Psychic Dominator Power
superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Psychic Dominator in future launched missions.

superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Great Tempest Power
superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Great Tempest in future launched missions.

secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Chronoshift Power
secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Chronoshift in future launched missions.

secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Invulnerability Power
secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Iron Curtain Invulnerability power in future launched missions.

secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Rage Power
secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Rage Inductor power in future launched missions.

Drakuv Prison Vehicle Access.name: Drakuv Prison Vehicle Access (retired: aid power only)
Drakuv Prison Vehicle Access.description: Use the Drakuv Prison Vehicle Power; the payload is not a trainable unit.

Harbinger Access.name: Harbinger Access (retired: aid power only)
Harbinger Access.description: Use the Harbinger Power; the strike aircraft is not a trainable unit.

Harbinger Tower Access.name: Harbinger Tower Access (retired: power has no tower prerequisite)
Harbinger Tower Access.description: Harbinger Power works anywhere without constructing a Harbinger Tower.

EMP Control Station Access.name: EMP Control Station Access (retired: power has no station prerequisite)
EMP Control Station Access.description: EM Pulse works anywhere without constructing an EMP Control Station.

Blasticade Power.name: Blasticade Power (retired: requires Blast Trenches)
Blasticade Power.description: Removed because a building-free Blasticade has no effect without owned Blast Trenches.

Elite Reserves Power.name: Elite Reserves Power (retired: unsafe building-free grant)
Elite Reserves Power.description: Disabled because its internal production marker requires the original Soviet lab source.

V3 Test Drop Power.name: V3 Test Drop Power (retired: test disabled)
V3 Test Drop Power.description: Custom 20-V3 delivery test is preserved for future use but currently disabled.
